headline: Is Hormel’s SPAM Dog Rollout a Meaningful Test of Brand Stretch for Hormel Foods (HRL)?
summary: Hormel Foods recently expanded its SPAM® brand with the launch of the SPAM® Dog, a hot dog-style SPAM® product now rolling out to restaurants, stadiums, and convenience stores across the U.S. following its national debut at the National Restaurant Association Show in Chicago. This move highlights Hormel’s effort to move “beyond the can” by using SPAM® in a new format tailored to foodservice roller grills, potentially deepening its presence in convenience and away‑from‑home eating...
